calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Anne M. Epperly, Esq. appeared for plaintiff One Rincon Development, LLC.
Anne Dykstra, sales manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Defendant Margaret Anne Thomson was present in pro per, placed under oath, but was precluded from participating in today's hearing as a default was entered against Ms. Thomson on January 14, 2010.
Settlement between plaintiff and defendant Chicago Title Company was reached on December 9, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 25, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff One Rincon Development, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Margaret Anne Thomson as follows:

Damages/Principal - $24,624.86.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - $3,000.00.
Damages pursuant ot Civil Code Section 1057.3(b)(2) - $1,000.00.
Costs - $670.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $29,294.86.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
